title: wedelia ligulifolia
intro: Wedelia ligulifolia, also known as the Mexican daisy or Flor de Muerto, is a flowering plant species native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia ligulifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Wedelia ligulifolia can be consumed as a tea or used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile natural remedy.
